content.content:
Sprint 14 Task Assignments (2026-07-07 to 2026-07-18)

Task ID  | Description                               | Assignee          | Points | Due Date   | Status
---------|-------------------------------------------|-------------------|--------|------------|------------
HEL-241  | Dashboard: data table component           | Fatima Al-Rashid  | 5      | 2026-07-14 | In Progress
HEL-242  | Dashboard: chart rendering module         | Tomas Rivera      | 8      | 2026-07-16 | In Progress
HEL-243  | Data ingestion: date format normalization | Amir Hassan       | 5      | 2026-07-15 | Blocked
HEL-244  | Integration test suite: auth flows        | Kenji Watanabe    | 3      | 2026-07-14 | Done
HEL-245  | Integration test suite: data pipeline     | Kenji Watanabe    | 5      | 2026-07-18 | In Progress
HEL-246  | UAT environment: server provisioning      | Nadia Petrov      | 8      | 2026-07-16 | At Risk
HEL-247  | Performance benchmark: dashboard load     | Derek Okafor      | 3      | 2026-07-18 | Not Started
HEL-248  | GeoSync license renewal coordination      | Raj Patel         | 2      | 2026-07-14 | In Progress

Project Helios — QA Testing Log: Sprint 14
QA Engineer: Kenji Watanabe
Period: 2026-07-07 to 2026-07-11 (ongoing)

=== Test Suite: Authentication Flows ===
TC-401  OAuth token issuance              PASS
TC-402  Token refresh                     PASS
TC-403  Expired token rejection           PASS
TC-404  Invalid scope rejection           PASS
Suite result: 4/4 PASS

=== Test Suite: Data Pipeline — Batch Ingestion ===
TC-501  CSV ingestion (10k records)                  PASS
TC-502  JSON ingestion (10k records)                 PASS
TC-503  XML ingestion (5k records)                   PASS
TC-504  Date normalization (ISO 8601 input)          PASS
TC-505  Date normalization (MM/DD/YYYY input)        FAIL  [OPEN — HEL-D-014]
TC-506  Duplicate record detection                   PASS
TC-507  Large file ingestion (500k records)          FAIL  [OPEN — HEL-D-015]
Suite result: 5/7 PASS, 2 FAIL

=== Test Suite: Dashboard ===
TC-601  Data table rendering (10k records)           PASS
TC-602  Chart rendering — line chart                 IN PROGRESS
TC-603  Chart rendering — bar chart                  NOT RUN
TC-604  Load time benchmark (100k records)           NOT RUN
Suite result: 1/4 complete

=== Open Defects ===
HEL-D-014  Date normalization fails for MM/DD/YYYY input format.
           Affects ~40% of Meridian source data. Severity: HIGH.
           Owner: Amir Hassan. Blocked pending Meridian sample data (due 2026-07-15).

HEL-D-015  Large file ingestion (>200k records) causes memory overflow.
           Pipeline crashes at approximately 210k record mark. Severity: HIGH.
           Owner: Amir Hassan. Root cause under investigation.

Overall sprint 14 test status: 10/15 test cases executed, 2 FAIL (open), 3 not yet run.

content.text: I’ve reviewed both sources and identified the tasks at risk. I’ll draft the deadline-risk assessment file now.

input.content:
Sprint 14 Deadline Risk Assessment
Sprint Period: 2026-07-07 to 2026-07-18
Analysis Date: Based on sprint_14_task_assignments.txt and helios_testing_log_sprint14.txt (through 2026-07-11)

== Summary ==
3 tasks are at HIGH risk of missing the sprint deadline, 2 tasks at MEDIUM risk.

== HIGH RISK ==

1. HEL-243 - Data ingestion: date format normalization
   Assignee: Amir Hassan | Due: 2026-07-15 | Status: Blocked | Points: 5
   Risk Reason:
   - Status is Blocked.
   - Testing log shows TC-505 FAIL (HEL-D-014): Date normalization fails for MM/DD/YYYY input format. Severity: HIGH, affects ~40% of Meridian source data.
   - Blocked pending Meridian sample data due 2026-07-15 (same day as task due date) - no buffer.
   - Also owner of HEL-D-015: Large file ingestion (>200k) causes memory overflow, crashes at ~210k records. Severity: HIGH. Root cause under investigation.
   - Both defects directly affect this task's deliverable.

2. HEL-246 - UAT environment: server provisioning
   Assignee: Nadia Petrov | Due: 2026-07-16 | Status: At Risk | Points: 8
   Risk Reason:
   - Explicitly marked as "At Risk" in task assignments.
   - 8-point task (largest size alongside HEL-242) with only 2 days left before due date from last log date.
   - No related passing test in testing log to show progress; UAT environment is prerequisite for later UAT, so delay could cascade.

3. HEL-245 - Integration test suite: data pipeline
   Assignee: Kenji Watanabe | Due: 2026-07-18 | Status: In Progress | Points: 5
   Risk Reason:
   - Depends on fixes for HEL-243 / defects HEL-D-014 and HEL-D-015.
   - Testing log suite result: Data Pipeline - Batch Ingestion 5/7 PASS, 2 FAIL (open).
   - TC-505 and TC-507 failing due to upstream data ingestion issues. Cannot complete until HEL-243 unblocked.
   - Due on final day of sprint (2026-07-18), leaving no slack.

== MEDIUM RISK ==

4. HEL-247 - Performance benchmark: dashboard load
   Assignee: Derek Okafor | Due: 2026-07-18 | Status: Not Started | Points: 3
   Risk Reason:
   - Status is Not Started as of assignment file, due on last day of sprint.
   - Related test TC-604 Load time benchmark (100k records) is NOT RUN.
   - Depends on Dashboard tasks (HEL-241/242) being stable first.

5. HEL-242 - Dashboard: chart rendering module
   Assignee: Tomas Rivera | Due: 2026-07-16 | Status: In Progress | Points: 8
   Risk Reason:
   - 8-point high-effort task.
   - Testing log shows TC-602 Chart rendering - line chart IN PROGRESS and TC-603 bar chart NOT RUN.
   - With 2 chart types still not complete/passing 5 days before due date (per log period ending 2026-07-11), at risk of slipping.

== LOW / ON TRACK ==

- HEL-241 - Dashboard: data table component (Fatima Al-Rashid, Due 2026-07-14, In Progress): TC-601 PASS (Data table rendering 10k records) - suggests code is working, needs to finish by due date but low risk.
- HEL-244 - Integration test suite: auth flows (Kenji Watanabe, Done): All 4 auth tests (TC-401 to TC-404) PASS.
- HEL-248 - GeoSync license renewal coordination (Raj Patel, Due 2026-07-14, In Progress, 2 pts): Administrative, small size, not reflected in test log, likely low risk unless external dependency.

== Overall Sprint Risk ==
Sprint has 10/15 test cases executed, 2 FAIL (HIGH severity), 3 not yet run as of 2026-07-11.
Critical path at risk: HEL-243 -> HEL-245 blocks data pipeline completion. HEL-246 UAT provisioning and HEL-242/247 dashboard tasks are parallel risks that could cause spillover into Sprint 15.
Recommend: Unblock HEL-243 (expedite Meridian sample data, prioritize memory overflow investigation), allocate support to HEL-246, and ensure dashboard chart work completes before performance benchmark.

content.text:
I've analyzed the sprint 14 task assignments and testing log and written the deadline risk assessment to **sprint14_deadline_risk.txt**.

**Summary of findings:**

**HIGH RISK (3 tasks):**
- **HEL-243** (Amir Hassan, Due 2026-07-15, Blocked) - Date normalization fails for MM/DD/YYYY (HEL-D-014, HIGH severity, 40% of Meridian data affected) and large file memory overflow (HEL-D-015). Blocked pending sample data due same day as task due date.
- **HEL-246** (Nadia Petrov, Due 2026-07-16, At Risk) - Explicitly marked At Risk, 8 points, no test evidence of progress, potential cascade to UAT.
- **HEL-245** (Kenji Watanabe, Due 2026-07-18, In Progress) - Depends on HEL-243; 2/7 data pipeline tests failing (TC-505, TC-507), due on final sprint day with no buffer.

**MEDIUM RISK (2 tasks):**
- **HEL-247** (Derek Okafor, Due 2026-07-18, Not Started) - Not started as of log date, dependent on dashboard stability, TC-604 NOT RUN.
- **HEL-242** (Tomas Rivera, Due 2026-07-16, In Progress) - 8-point task, TC-602 IN PROGRESS, TC-603 NOT RUN for chart rendering.

Low/On Track: HEL-241 (TC-601 PASS), HEL-244 (Done, 4/4 auth PASS), HEL-248 (small admin task).
